name: claude-code-toolkit
description: Claude Code skills + a failure-mode hook: scaffold MCP servers, audit a repo for public release, write session handoffs, and catch classes of bugs before they ship.

plugins.name: claude-code-toolkit
plugins.description: Skills: scaffold-mcp (generate a tested MCP server), public-ready (audit + publish a repo), handoff (write a PICKUP handoff), failure-scan (review a diff against a failure-mode catalog). Plus a PostToolUse hook that auto-flags risky patterns (e.g. unpaginated DynamoDB scans).
